title: IMAP trigger fires twice intermittently
symptom: The IMAP trigger node in the workflow fires twice about 50% of the time, causing duplicate executions. This issue persists even after switching email addresses and occurs in both cloud and local versions.
applies_when: Workflow is triggered by new emails
not_this_if: Issue does not involve duplicate triggers
root_cause: The problem arises from multiple instances of the workflow running simultaneously, often due to 'ghost' versions of the workflow still being active. This can happen after updates or changes to the workflow, leading to unexpected behavior.
fix_steps: Restart the VPS hosting n8n to terminate any ghost runners.
Monitor the workflow execution to ensure only one instance is active.
agent_instruction: Restart the VPS to resolve the issue of duplicate IMAP triggers.
